metadata.description: Nominal geographic tree generated from UNSD M49 / UN Geoscheme data for AFluID country roll-up and drill-down.
manual_additions: Taiwan added under Asia > Eastern Asia with M49 code 158.
Kosovo added under Europe > Southern Europe with M49 code 412.

Taiwan.curation_note: Added manually for statistical use; UNSD M49 code 158.

Kosovo.curation_note: Added manually for statistical use; UNSD M49 code 412.
